samples.text: If the switch is flipped, then the light comes on. The switch is flipped. Does it follow that the light comes on?
Whenever the switch is flipped, the light comes on as a result. In this case the switch is flipped. Can we conclude that the light comes on?
If the switch is toggled, then the light illuminates. The switch is toggled. Does it follow that the light illuminates?
The condition for 'the light comes on' is met because the switch is flipped. Does it follow that the light comes on?
If the switch is flipped, then the light comes on. The switch is flipped. This topic was discussed last week. Does it follow that the light comes on?
